summary: Phase 1 of Creative Mojo Admin tested end-to-end. All 17 backend pytest tests pass (auth, brute-force lockout, dashboard, airtable inspector, MongoDB invariants). All 21 frontend flows verified via Playwright: login (success + error), sidebar nav, dashboard KPIs, airtable inspector with table selection + fields + sample records + count, logout, and route guard. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and concise. server.py is 412 lines - acceptable for now but consider splitting into modules (auth, airtable, dashboard) once more features are added.
FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in favour of lifespan handlers - low priority but worth migrating in a later phase.
create_user endpoint returns 200 instead of 201 for resource creation - minor REST convention nit.
airtable_get raises raw airtable error text which could leak the PAT-protected base id; consider sanitising error detail before bubbling up.

Brute-force lockout keyed by ip:email is correct, but record_failure does not reset count after the lockout window expires automatically until clear_failures is called - re-attempts after 15 mins will be allowed but the count stays high. Consider resetting count on first attempt past locked_until.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded admin. Brute-force test used a fake unique email so the real admin was never locked.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py covers all Phase 1 endpoints and includes a brute-force lockout test (run last, uses fake unique email). For Airtable count test, /count endpoint paginates fully so allow up to 90s timeout. KPI tile text values for kpi-franchisees/contracts/contacts include hard-coded 'Source: 88/134/7,632' strings from the frontend that are NOT from the API (data-testids will need updating once migration KPIs become live). Login uses httpOnly cookies with samesite=none/secure=true - requests.Session() handles them correctly when same domain.
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA - all features working as specified.
